    • Method Detail

      • cancel

        public static void cancel()
        Cancels all tasks.

      • createToken

        public static java.lang.String createToken(int expiresIn,
                                           java.lang.String accountId,
                                           java.lang.String appId,
                                           java.lang.String appKey,
                                           java.lang.String appSecret)
        Method that generates Analytics JWT token.
        Parameters:
        expiresIn - Token lifetime in seconds.
        accountId - Account Id.
        appId - App Id.
        appKey - App key.
        appSecret - App secret key.
        Returns:
        The output of this method will be “{appKey}::{JwtToken}”.

      • endOnboarding

        public static void endOnboarding()
        Tells the cloud that onboarding has been ended.

        Calling this method is not allowed and you will receive MaiCallback.onFailed(MAIError) in the following cases: - if init(Context, String, MaiCallback) wasn't called; - if startOnboarding(int) method wasn't called; - if setOnboardingType(String) OR setOnboardingType(OnboardingType) (String, Callback)} method wasn't called. Use endOnboarding(EndData) with EndData.createFailure(String) to "end" a failed onboarding without setting a type.

        In case of failure to send collected data: - All unsent data will be saved in the app-specific storage. The SDK will try to send stored data during next API calls; - MaiCallback#onTokenInvalid(Retrier) or MaiCallback.onFailed(MAIError) will be called.

      • endOnboarding

        public static void endOnboarding(com.cirrent.networkintelligencedata.onboarding.EndData endData)
        The same as endOnboarding() but this method is used to report a "reason" of an unsuccessful on-boarding. You can call this method with EndData.createFailure(String) to "end" a failed onboarding without setting a type. In this case MaiCallback.onFailed(MAIError) will not be called.
        Parameters:
        endData - EndData

      • enterStep

        public static void enterStep(com.cirrent.networkintelligencedata.onboarding.StepData stepData)
        Sends to the cloud information about previous(if it occurred) and current step.

        Calling this method is not allowed and you will receive MaiCallback.onFailed(MAIError) in the following cases: - if init(Context, String, MaiCallback) wasn't called.

        In case of failure to send collected data: - All unsent data will be saved in the app-specific storage. The SDK will try to send stored data during next API calls; - MaiCallback#onTokenInvalid(Retrier) or MaiCallback.onFailed(MAIError) will be called.

        Parameters:
        stepData - StepData

      • init

        public static void init(android.content.Context appContext,
                        java.lang.String token,
                        com.cirrent.networkintelligencedata.onboarding.MaiCallback callback)
        Required method that initializes Mobile Application Intelligence. Must be called before any other MAI methods. Also it collects various Wi-Fi and router information and sends it to the cloud when collected.

        The SDK should be initialized until startOnboarding(int) is called.

        In case of failure to send collected data: - All unsent data will be saved in the app-specific storage. The SDK will try to send stored data during next API calls; - MaiCallback#onTokenInvalid(Retrier) or MaiCallback.onFailed(MAIError) will be called.

        Parameters:
        appContext - Application Context.
        token - Analytics token.
        callback - MaiCallback

      • isDebugModeEnabled

        public static boolean isDebugModeEnabled()

      • removeAllCollectedData

        public static void removeAllCollectedData(android.content.Context appContext)
        Removes all cached collected data.

      • setDebugMode

        public static void setDebugMode(boolean enabled)

      • setOnboardingDeviceInfo

        public static void setOnboardingDeviceInfo(java.lang.String deviceId)
        Optional method that allows you to send a Device ID to the cloud.

        Calling this method is not allowed and you will receive MaiCallback.onFailed(MAIError) in the following cases: - if init(Context, String, MaiCallback) wasn't called; - if onboarding wasn't started.

        In case of failure to send collected data: - All unsent data will be saved in the app-specific storage. The SDK will try to send stored data during next API calls; - MaiCallback#onTokenInvalid(Retrier) or MaiCallback.onFailed(MAIError) will be called.

        Parameters:
        deviceId - Currently on-boarding Device ID.

      • setOnboardingDeviceInfo

        public static void setOnboardingDeviceInfo(java.lang.String deviceId,
                                           java.util.Map<java.lang.String,java.lang.String> additionalAttributes)
        Same as setOnboardingDeviceInfo(String) but this method allows you to add additional device attributes that will be sent along with the Device ID.
        Parameters:
        deviceId - Currently on-boarding Device ID.
        additionalAttributes - Additional attributes.

      • setOnboardingType

        public static void setOnboardingType(com.cirrent.networkintelligencedata.onboarding.OnboardingType type)
        Required method that allows you to set OnboardingType. Onboarding type should be set until endOnboarding() is called.

        Calling this method is not allowed and you will receive MaiCallback.onFailed(MAIError) in the following cases: - if init(Context, String, MaiCallback) wasn't called; - if onboarding wasn't started.

        In case of failure to send collected data: - All unsent data will be saved in the app-specific storage. The SDK will try to send stored data during next API calls; - MaiCallback#onTokenInvalid(Retrier) or MaiCallback.onFailed(MAIError) will be called.

        Parameters:
        type - OnboardingType

      • setOnboardingType

        public static void setOnboardingType(java.lang.String customType)
        Same as setOnboardingType(OnboardingType) but this method allows you to set a custom on-boarding type.
        Parameters:
        customType - Custom on-boarding type.

      • startOnboarding

        public static void startOnboarding()
        Required method that tells the cloud that onboarding has been started. Also creates a unique onboarding id and stores it for subsequent calls.

        Calling this method is not allowed and you will receive MaiCallback.onFailed(MAIError) in the following cases: - if init(Context, String, MaiCallback) wasn't called; - if onboarding already started and you try to call it again without calling endOnboarding() or endOnboarding(EndData).

        In case of failure to send collected data: - All unsent data will be saved in the app-specific storage. The SDK will try to send stored data during next API calls; - MaiCallback#onTokenInvalid(Retrier) or MaiCallback.onFailed(MAIError) will be called.

      • startOnboarding

        public static void startOnboarding(int onboardingSessionTimeout)
        Required method that tells the cloud that onboarding has been started. Also creates a unique onboarding id and stores it for subsequent calls.

        Calling this method is not allowed and you will receive MaiCallback.onFailed(MAIError) in the following cases: - if init(Context, String, MaiCallback) wasn't called; - if onboarding already started and you try to call it again without calling endOnboarding() or endOnboarding(EndData).

        In case of failure to send collected data: - All unsent data will be saved in the app-specific storage. The SDK will try to send stored data during next API calls; - MaiCallback#onTokenInvalid(Retrier) or MaiCallback.onFailed(MAIError) will be called.

        Parameters:
        onboardingSessionTimeout - if the time gap between onboarding steps > this value then onboarding duration timers will be paused till the next step is performed. By default this value = DEFAULT_ONBOARDING_SESSION_TIMEOUT

      • startOnboarding

        public static void startOnboarding(int onboardingSessionTimeout,
                                   com.cirrent.networkintelligencedata.onboarding.OnboardingType type)
        Same as startOnboarding(int) but this method allows you to set OnboardingType.
        Parameters:
        onboardingSessionTimeout - if the time gap between onboarding steps > this value then onboarding duration timers will be paused till the next step is performed. By default this value = DEFAULT_ONBOARDING_SESSION_TIMEOUT
        type - OnboardingType.

      • startOnboarding

        public static void startOnboarding(int onboardingSessionTimeout,
                                   java.lang.String customType)
        Same as startOnboarding(int) but this method allows you to set a custom on-boarding type.
        Parameters:
        onboardingSessionTimeout - if the time gap between onboarding steps > this value then onboarding duration timers will be paused till the next step is performed. By default this value = DEFAULT_ONBOARDING_SESSION_TIMEOUT
        customType - Custom on-boarding type.

      • startOnboarding

        public static void startOnboarding(com.cirrent.networkintelligencedata.onboarding.OnboardingType type)
        Same as startOnboarding() but this method allows you to set OnboardingType.
        Parameters:
        type - OnboardingType.

      • startOnboarding

        public static void startOnboarding(java.lang.String customType)
        Same as startOnboarding() but this method allows you to set a custom on-boarding type.
        Parameters:
        customType - Custom on-boarding type.
